summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Firebase-based catalog management application. Authentication, UI, color system, and responsive design work excellently. Critical Firebase Firestore permissions issue blocks all CRUD operations.

critical_bugs.issue: Missing or insufficient permissions for 'productos' collection
critical_bugs.impact: Blocks all CRUD operations - cannot load, create, edit, or delete products

integration_issues.issue: All product operations fail due to Firebase permissions

passed_tests: Firebase Authentication login blocks UI until authenticated
Dashboard renders only after successful authentication
Product modal opens correctly with 'Nuevo Producto' button
Smart color system with 500+ colors and tone processing (rojo, azul, verde, oro, plata)
Tone variations work (rojo claro, azul oscuro, pastel verde)
Invalid color handling with proper error messages
Color pills display with correct preview circles
Logout functionality returns to login screen
Responsive design on mobile (390x844), tablet (768x1024), and desktop (1920x1080)
Elegant design with Playfair Display font, beige color scheme, 24px rounded corners
action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Fix Firebase Firestore permissions for 'productos' collection. Current rules are blocking read/write operations. Update Firestore security rules to allow authenticated users to read and write to the productos collection. Without this fix, the entire CRUD functionality is non-functional.
